title: Crispy Jamaican Coconut Dumplings
description: Delicious keto dumplings with crispy exterior and fluffy interior, infused with the flavors of Jamaica.

ingredients.name: Crisp Coconut Flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a high-quality coconut flour for the best results.

ingredients.name: Jamaican Seasonings
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of spices like thyme, allspice, and scotch bonnet peppers to get that authentic Jamaican flavor.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: Large egg for binding the dumpling mixture.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter for greasing the pan.

ingredients.name: Dumpling
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought dumplings for this recipe.

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine the coconut flour, Jamaican seasonings, and egg.
3. Mix well until a smooth dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
5. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
6. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
8. Place a dumpling in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
9. Transfer the cooked dumpling to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Repeat the process with the remaining dumplings.
11. Brush the tops of the dumplings with melted butter.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
